name: Fighter
description: A practiced combatant who meets danger directly.

name: Rogue
description: A resourceful adventurer who wins through precision and opportunity.

name: Athletics
description: Training in climbing, jumping, swimming, and feats of bodily force.

name: Investigation
description: Training in finding clues and reasoning from what they reveal.

name: Perception
description: Training in noticing hidden, distant, or easily missed details.

name: Stealth
description: Training in moving without being noticed.
